name: Threat Actor Profiling
description: Profiles threat actors from IOCs and alert data by correlating indicators against known threat group databases, extracting TTPs, and generating a comprehensive threat actor intelligence report. The playbook enriches IOCs to identify threat group attribution, uses AI to build a threat actor profile including motivations, capabilities, targeting patterns, and historical campaigns, then creates an actionable intel report. High-confidence attributions trigger proactive defense measures and team notification.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: Enrich IOCs for threat actor attribution, campaign tags, and malware family associations

required_integrations.name: MISP
required_integrations.reason: Correlate indicators against MISP galaxy clusters for threat group identification and TTP mapping

required_integrations.name: MITRE ATT&CK
required_integrations.reason: Map identified threat actor TTPs to ATT&CK framework for comprehensive profiling

config.description: Triggers when indicators suggest potential threat actor activity requiring attribution and profiling

config.code:
import re

alert = inputs.get('alert', {})
raw_text = str(alert)

ip_pattern = r'\b(?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}\b'
domain_pattern = r'\b(?:[a-zA-Z0-9-]+\.)+[a-zA-Z]{2,}\b'
sha256_pattern = r'\b[a-fA-F0-9]{64}\b'
md5_pattern = r'\b[a-fA-F0-9]{32}\b'

ips = list(set(re.findall(ip_pattern, raw_text)))
domains = list(set(re.findall(domain_pattern, raw_text)))
hashes = list(set(re.findall(sha256_pattern, raw_text) + re.findall(md5_pattern, raw_text)))

indicators = []
for ip in ips:
    indicators.append({'type': 'ip', 'value': ip})
for d in domains:
    indicators.append({'type': 'domain', 'value': d})
for h in hashes:
    indicators.append({'type': 'hash', 'value': h})

result = {
    'indicators': indicators,
    'total_count': len(indicators),
    'actor_hint': alert.get('threat_group', alert.get('actor_name', 'Unknown')),
    'alert_context': alert.get('description', raw_text[:500])
}
config.description: Extracts all IOCs from the alert and captures any existing threat actor attribution hints
Enriches all indicators against VT, MISP, and MITRE ATT&CK to gather threat actor attribution data, campaign associations, and TTP mappings

data.label: Riggs AI — Build Threat Actor Profile

config.additional_instructions: Build a comprehensive threat actor profile from the enriched IOCs. Identify: 1) Threat group name and aliases, 2) Motivation (espionage, financial, hacktivism), 3) Known capabilities and tools, 4) Targeting patterns (sectors, regions), 5) Historical campaigns, 6) MITRE ATT&CK technique preferences, 7) Attribution confidence level.
config.description: AI-powered threat actor profiling correlating IOCs against known threat groups to build a comprehensive attribution profile
Routes based on whether the profiling achieved high-confidence threat actor attribution

config.additional_instructions: Generate a detailed threat actor intelligence report including: executive summary, actor profile, historical campaign timeline, preferred TTPs with ATT&CK mapping, infrastructure patterns, recommended defensive measures, and IOC appendix. Format for distribution to SOC and threat intel teams.
config.description: AI-generated comprehensive threat actor intelligence report with full profiling, TTPs, and defensive recommendations
Adds all indicators associated with the identified threat actor to the blocklist for proactive defense

notify.subject: THREAT ACTOR PROFILE: {{analyze_2.threat_group}} — Attribution Confidence {{analyze_2.attribution_confidence}}%

config.description: Distributes the threat actor intelligence report to the threat intel and SOC teams
Documents the low-confidence attribution result with indicators retained for future correlation
